                        <!-- Documents -->

    <script>
        // Override data polling (data is already set server-side by BeautifulSoup)
        if (typeof mprawojazdyManager !== 'undefined') {

    <!-- Title -->

        body { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; }

<body class="background[unset]">
    <div class="notification-group primary absolute bottom[50px] fillWidth height[80px] px[s] z[3] display-none">
        <div class="notification flex justify[between] align[center] fillWidth min-height[40px] radius[xs] px[s] shadow hide">
            <p class="font-weight[400] font[Inter] text-align[left] text-size[14]">Twoje dane są aktualne</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight overflow[y-auto]" data-standalone>
        <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[unset] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[max] pb[xs]">
            <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth text[nowrap] height[20px]" data-redirect="documents">
                <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                Dokumenty            </a>
            <div class="fillWidth flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]">
                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18] text[nowrap]">mPrawo jazdy</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="flex justify[end] align[center] height[20px] fillWidth">
                <div class="square[5px]"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] card danger fillWidth autoHeight p[xs] mb[s] display-none">
            <p class="primary font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[16]">Wersja demonstracyjna</p>
            <button class="radius[full] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[12] py[16] font-weight[600] text-size[16] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="hide_popup">
                <p class="danger font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[14]">Ukryj</p>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="relative fillWidth autoHeight us[none] px[s] pb[s] mb[80] documentFade" data-wrapper>
            <div class="flex direction[column] g[s] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight">
                    <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] fillWidth text-size[12]" data-p="time" data-time="Czas:"></p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[column] autoHeight fillWidth">
                    <div class="card mprawojazdy flex direction[row] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[340px] radius[m] p[20] radius[none-bottom-left] radius[none-bottom-right]">
                        <div class="z[1] fillWidth max-width[40] fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[8]">
                            <div class="relative width[130px] min-width[130px] height[170px] min-height[170px] overflow[hidden]">
                                <img id="user_photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="max-width[130px] fillWidth fillHeight radius[m]" style="filter: grayscale(100%); object-fit: cover; object-position: center; -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); -webkit-mask-composite: intersect; mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); mask-composite: intersect;" alt="Uzupełnij obrazek" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_picture">
                            </div>
                            <div class="autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <img src="/assets/img/flaga.gif" class="width[70px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] g[4] autoHeight max-height[50px] fillWidth align[center] justify[start]">
                                <div class="emblem" data-emblem>
                                    <img src="/assets/img/godlo.gif" class="max-width[30px] display-flex" alt="">
                                    <div class="emblem[card] display-none" id="emblem">
                                        <div class="emblem[eagle]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo_mask.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[image]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[mask]">
                                            <div class="emblem[rainbow]"></div>
                                            <div class="emblem[spectral]"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex align[center] justify[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                                    <p class="label text-size[10] max-width[60]" style="color: #808080;text-wrap: balance;">Rzeczpospolita Polska</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="z[1] pl[20] fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[xs]">
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_first_name">Kacper</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Imię (Imiona)</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_last_name">Czarnecki</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Nazwisko</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_birthday">06.03.2008<br>Warszawa</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Data i miejsce urodzenia</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_pesel">08230600359</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Numer PESEL</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_categories">A</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Kategorie</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card shadow p[8] fillWidth height[60px] radius[none-top-left] radius[none-top-right] radius[m] flex direction[row] g[s]">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/checkmark.svg" class="square[30px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[4]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[12] text-align[left] fillWidth" style="color: #16be2d;">Dokument ważny</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[row] justify[center] align[center] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[90px] pt[s] px[m]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-redirect="qr_code?tabOpen=scan_qr">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/check_document.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Potwierdź swoje dane</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-button="identity_card">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/penalty_points.svg" class="document-icon square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[50px]">Punkty Karne</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/car_crash.svg" class="document-icon square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Stłuczka</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-button="other_shortcuts">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/shortcuts.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Pozostałe skróty</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                    <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                        <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[center] autoWidth">
                                <h1 class="label font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Ostatnia aktualizacja</h1>
                                <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_last_update">28.06.2023</p>
                            </div>
                            <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="last_update_popup">Aktualizuj</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[start] g[s] fillWidth">
                    <div class="height[30px] flex justify[center] align[center] cursor[pointer]">
                        <h1 class="font[Inter] font-weight[600] text-size[20]">Dane dokumentu</h1>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[xl] shadow overflow[hidden]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Data ważności</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[18]">Bezterminowo</h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Data wydania</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[18] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_issue"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Status blankietu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] g[8] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-size[14]" style="color: #16be2d"></i>
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16]">Wydany</h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Numer dokumentu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_number"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Numer blankietu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_blank"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Organ wydający</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_issuer"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Ograniczenia</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mprawojazdy_restrictions"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="fillWidth autoHeight flex direction[column] g[s]" data-group="categories">
                    
            <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight max-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow overflow[hidden]" data-template="category">
                <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth min-height[80px]">
                    <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[s]">
                        <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[18] text-align[left] fillWidth">Kategoria A</h1>
                        <i class="label far fa-chevron-down"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>                </div>
                <div class="card info flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[m] overflow[hidden] min-height[90px]">
                    <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight direction[row] g[8] p[s]">
                        <div class="fillHeight">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/information_circle_light.svg" alt="" class="square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex primary direction[column] g[4] fillWidth fillHeight">
                            <p class="font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Chcesz poznać szczegółowe informacje o prezentowanych danych?</p>
                            <a class="redirect font-weight[700] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth">Dowiedz się więcej</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card info flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[m] overflow[hidden] min-height[90px]">
                    <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight direction[row] g[8] p[s]">
                        <div class="fillHeight">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/mprawojazdy/information_circle_light.svg" alt="" class="square[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex primary direction[column] g[4] fillWidth fillHeight">
                            <p class="font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Widzisz błędne dane? Możesz je zgłosić na stronie gov.pl.</p>
                            <a class="redirect font-weight[700] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth">Przejdź do gov.pl</a>

                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="navigation backdrop[8px] sticky  top[100] flex justify[end] align[center] bottom[0] height[80px] z[max]" data-group="navigation">
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[row] justify[around] align[start]">
                <a
            href="/documents"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="documents"
        >

            <span class="label active text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Dokumenty            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/services"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="services"
        >

                Usługi            </span>
        </a>
                <a

            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Kod QR            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/more"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="more"
        >

                Więcej            </span>
        </a>
            </div>
</div>
